---
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Welcome {.unnumbered}

This book presents encroachment accounts within recreation areas and especially valuable nature in Norwegian municipalities.

### Project Overview

This is an internal project supported by the MAREA project. Its goal is the compilation of encroachment accounts within recreation areas and especially valuable nature in Norwegian municipalities.

### Data Sources

The analyses use the following datasets:

- **Outdoor recreation areas** from [naturebase.no](https://geocortex02.miljodirektoratet.no/vertigisstudio/web/?app=a3a09afee5c24c459c53a9a9ff0915f1)
- **Land take data** from [Zenodo repository](https://zenodo.org/records/15130992), version 1 (3/04/2025)
- **Administrative boundaries** from Eurostat [Local Administrative Units](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/gisco/geodata/statistical-units/local-administrative-units)
- **Specially important nature types** from [Naturtyper - verdsatte](https://kartkatalog.geonorge.no/metadata/naturtyper-verdsatte/64cbb884-a19d-4356-a114-380cfe4a7314)

### Structure

The book is organized into two main parts:

1. **Encroachment Accounts** - Detailed analysis of land take in recreation areas
2. **Accounting Tables** - Summary tables at municipality (kommune) and county (fylke) levels
